# Change Log

## Purpose
Track approved and pending changes across the project or program lifecycle.

## Audience
Change Manager, Project Manager, PMO Lead, Stakeholders.

## Inputs
- Change requests (`docs/templates/shared/change-request.md`).
- Impact assessments (`docs/templates/shared/change-impact-assessment.md`).

## Change Log Entries
| Change ID | Date | Description | Impact Summary | Status | Owner | Approval Reference |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] All approved changes logged with references.
- [ ] Status reflects current implementation state.
- [ ] Owners assigned for each change.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Change log entries tie back to approved change requests.
- Status and approvals are current.
